title: 3D-Model-Editor
description: Allows you to place up to 9 different 3D models on each block to decorate your builds! Includes over 1000 models including variants and an integrated tutorial.
body:
# ✨ Features

- 1090+ different 3D models including variants
- place up to 9 models per Minecraft block
- individually customizable (rotation & block type)
- integrated tutorial

**⚠️ Do not forget to download the required resource pack ⚠️**

# 📖 Start

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/J8vhtpGV5Wc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

To activate the data pack, type in the command:

```
/reload
# or
/datapack enable "file/3D-Editor Datapack"
```
To **get** the items, type in the command:

```
/trigger bm1_3d_items_trg
```
# 📃 Models

In the latest version there are **over 1090 different models** available for decoration. Some of them even have some variants you can work with!

# 👨🏼‍💻 ChatGUI

Work faster with the brand-new Chat GUI to customize your models directly from the chat!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sfZZEfziDjQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# ⚙️ Settings

Enable addons or customize the data pack to match your workflow!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Leg0czI67L0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🏫 Integrated Tutorial

Learn how to use the data pack directly from the data pack itself!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IpjF60-LgQ0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🌍 Server resources

```
# Version 4.1.2
resource-pack=https://download.mc-packs.net/pack/41d6ad34a6c877542363f90a50de6d4441bee4ce.zip
resource-pack-sha1=41d6ad34a6c877542363f90a50de6d4441bee4ce﻿
```

Credit to [mc-packs.net](https://mc-packs.net/)

# 🚩 Known problems

**The datapack does not work on a server:**
- In [S4p0's](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/s4p0/) case, only a .rar file instead of a .zip file worked for the datapack file itself

**The item command does not work:**
- Some users experience the issue that the item command cannot be triggered, in this case I recommend uninstalling the datapack using the official function and activating it again!

# 🌍 Official website

[buildmodeone.com](https://buildmodeone.com/)

# 🆘 Help/Bugreports

Contact us via Planet Minecraft or e-mail:
[3dEditor@buildmodeone.com](mailto:3dEditor@buildmodeone.com)

# 👨🏼‍⚖️ Legal Terms

What you are allowed to do:

- Change this data pack for your own use
- Look at my code to learn how I do things

What you are **not allowed** to do:

- Upload this data pack to another website (Not even a changed version)
- Impersonate the creator

[![Certified](https://i.imgur.com/NbVuvwA.png)](https://discord.gg/SnJQcfq)
